name: LIDAR Blacksite
description: Navigate a procedural lightless facility through fading nearest-hit scans, reveal and recover an occluded verification beacon, and physically carry it to extraction.
natural_language: Scan the blacksite, recover the verification beacon, and escape with it.

metadata.variant_count_kind: 4 layouts × 2 mirrors × 4 palettes × 3² independent occluder sizes; decorative wall height/tone excluded
metadata.notes: The browser receives wall, occluder, beacon-volume, and exit-volume geometry required for its local renderer and collision loop, but never the hidden route or recommended scan stations. The verifier independently replays fixed-tick movement, swept collision, nearest ray hits, scan origins, line-of-sight pickup, carry, and extraction; client positions, hits, and completion labels are not trusted.
